experimental_design: H3pT11 phosphorylation inhibits Dot1-catalyzed H3K79me3 to regulate autophagy and telomere silencing
Here, we report that H3pT11 directly inhibits Dot1-catalyzed H3K79 tri-methylation (H3K79me3) and uncover how this histone crosstalk regulates autophagy and telomere silencing.
factor_value: H3pT11 directly inhibits Dot1-catalyzed H3K79 tri-methylation (H3K79me3)
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
